name: Starlink Group 15-14
description: A batch of 27 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.
program_description: Starlink is a satellite internet constellation operated by American aerospace company SpaceX
rocket_fact: Specific Impulse (ISP) is the 'miles per gallon' of rocketry, measuring how efficiently an engine turns fuel into thrust.
